title: Lloytron 3 Band 'Acapulco' Rechargeable Portable AM/SW/FM Radio + MP3 via USB or SD card + MusicStream - Cream - N6408CR

features: WAVEBANDS: Listen to your favourite Medium Wave (AM / MW), Short Wave (SW) or FM radio stations.

MUSIC STREAM: This radio plays music files by MusicStream (which is Bluetooth BT compatible) source such as Mobile Phone. This can be music streaming sources such as Spotify, Apple Music, Deezer etc or music stored directly on your phone.
USB & SD CARD: Play MP3 tunes using the USB slot or MicroSD (TF) card with full control of playback, pause, next song, previous song etc
RETRO DESIGN - The beautifully designed cabinet has a fantastic retro look whilst providing modern ways to listen to your favourite music.
USB RECHARGEABLE: The lithium ion rechargeable battery provides upto 8 hrs playtime on a single charge. Charge using a normal USB 5v power source (USB adaptor not included)
description: Tune in to your favourite SW, AM and FM radio stations with the retro style MusicStream radio. The retro design will look beautiful in your home and fits in with any room décor both modern and retro, with all the modern features you require. Listen to traditional SW/AM/FM radio channels or connect to your electronic device via MusicStream and play your music through the clear radio speakers. MP3 song files can also be played via the USB and micro SD card ports. This small radio with retro design is affordable and easy to use. Simply plug in a 5v USB charging source using the cables suplplied. With a full charge your will have hours of fun. This stylish radio is small and light enough to carry with you, making it ideal for garden parties, camping and beach trips. The built-in rechargeable battery allows for approximately 8 hours of continuous playback or simply plug directly into your USB Power Source. MusicStream is Bluetooth BT Compatible. FM 87.5-108Mhz MW 522-1620Khz SW 9.5 -18Mhz USB/Micro SD Card Format: FAT32 or exFAT / Maximum capacity 64Gb Music Format: MP3 Package includes: 1 x AM/SW/FM Radio 1 x USB Charging Lead 1 x Instruction manual NOTE: a USB power Source is not provided with this radio
